allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.Path -like '*ai-code-reviewer*' -or $_.MainWindowTitle -like '*frontend*' -or $_.Name -like '*node*' -or $_.Name -like '*vite*'} | Select-Object Id, Name, Path | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name | Format-Table")
Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Process -Name node | ForEach-Object { try { $_.MainModule.FileName } catch {} }\) | Select-String ''ai-code''")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,5173,8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { \\$proc = Get-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=\\$_.LocalPort; PID=\\$_.OwningProcess; Name=\\$proc.Name} }" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(rm -f build.log build_error.log build_final.log build_final_v2.log build_final_v3.log)
